prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约839名，2024年前移至700名，2025年回落至823名，近三年波动幅度约139名，2025年基准位次约823名。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985工程、211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2021-2023年第20名，2024年第21名，2025年第2 3名，2026年回升至第21名，稳居全国顶尖高校行列；2026年声誉评价为明显负面，主要涉及生命科学学院院长论文数据造假等学术不端事件，可能对部分考生 报考心理产生一定抑制；抖音热度排名第36位（较热），短视频平台关注度中等偏上；化学A+、数学A+、工商管理A+、应用经济学A+、物理学A、生物学A、统计 学A等14个学科获评A-及以上，学科实力雄厚。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信等工科专业社会热度高热推荐，与南开大学理科试验班（数学与大数据）、工科 试验班（信息科学与技术）等招生专业高度关联；新疆2026年总考生约238000人，按近年理科占比约68.6%估算，理科考生约163268人，较2025年约52538人大幅增加，竞争显著加 剧理科本科一批2025年421分，较2024年390分上升，反映整体分数线上移；南开大学位于天津，在新疆理科招生规模近年稳定在28人，属跨省招 生，地域偏好对报考影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次823名、2026年新疆理科考生规模大幅增加（竞争加剧）、学校声誉负面事件（抑制部分热度），预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移；预测最低位次约803名，区间711-895名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 工科试验班（卓越拔尖计划伯苓班）（光电信息科学与工程、计算机科学与技术、智能科学与技术）
- 理科试验班（数学与大数据）（数学与应用数学、信息与计算科学、数据科学、统计学）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 工科试验班（信息科学与技术）（计算机科学与技术、信息安全、物联网工程、自动化、智能科学与技术、软件工程）
- 智能医学工程
- 眼视光医学
- 理科试验班（物质科学与可持续发展）（化学、应用化学、生物科学、生物技术、环境科学等）
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 临床医学（5+3一体化）（本硕连读）
- 理科试验班（物理与光电信息技术工程）（物理学、应用物理学、光电信息科学与工程、电子信息科学与技术等）
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间711-895名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报，一档专业可冲刺（尤其数学与大数据、卓越拔尖班），三档专业作为保底。位次明显优于区间下限（如700名以内） 可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（如880名以上）应以三档为主、二档为辅。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 839, moved forward to 700 in 2024, and fell back to 823 in 2025, with a fluctuation range of about 139 positions over the past three years. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 823.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985 Project, 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 20th in the 2021-2023 Soft Science China University Rankings, 21st in 2024, 23rd in 2025, and rebounded to 21st in 2026, firmly among the top universities in the country; the reputation evaluation in 2026 is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents such as data fabrication in papers by the dean of the College of Life Sciences, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply; Douyin popularity ranking is 36th (relatively hot), with above-average attention on short video platforms; 14 disciplines including Chemistry A+, Mathematics A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A+, Physics A, Biology A, Statistics A, etc., have been rated A- or above, demonstrating strong academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communications are highly recommended due to social popularity, closely related to Nankai University's Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) and Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) enrollment majors; the total number of candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 is approximately 238,000, with an estimated 163,268 science candidates based on the recent science proportion of about 68.6%, a significant increase from approximately 52,538 in 2025, leading to intensified competition; the first batch of science undergraduate programs in 2025 had a cutoff score of 421, up from 390 in 2024, reflecting an overall upward trend in scores; Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with a stable enrollment scale of 28 students in Xinjiang in recent years, making it a cross-provincial enrollment, and regional preference has a limited impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the baseline ranking of 823 in 2025, the significant increase in the number of science candidates in Xinjiang in 2026 (intensified competition), and the negative reputation incidents of the university (suppressing some popularity), it is expected that the minimum admission ranking in 2026 will move slightly forward compared to 2025; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 803, with a range of 711-895.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Excellence Top Talent Plan Boling Class) (Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Computer Science and Technology, Intelligent Science and Technology)
- Science Experimental Class (Mathematics and Big Data) (Mathematics and Applied Mathematics, Information and Computing Science, Data Science, Statistics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Information Science and Technology) (Computer Science and Technology, Information Security, Internet of Things Engineering, Automation, Intelligent Science and Technology, Software Engineering)
- Intelligent Medical Engineering
- Ophthalmic Optics Medicine
- Science Experimental Class (Material Science and Sustainable Development) (Chemistry, Applied Chemistry, Biological Science, Biotechnology, Environmental Science, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Clinical Medicine (5+3 Integrated Program) (Bachelor-Master Continuation)
- Science Experimental Class (Physics and Optoelectronic Information Technology Engineering) (Physics, Applied Physics, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Electronic Information Science and Technology, etc.)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 711-895, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, with Tier 1 majors as a reach (especially Mathematics and Big Data, Excellence Top Talent Plan), and Tier 3 majors as a safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 700), you can focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors; if your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (e.g., above 880), you should prioritize Tier 3 majors with Tier 2 as a supplement.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2023 was approximately 200, moving forward to 167 in 2024, and remaining at 167 in 2025. Rankings have been steadily advancing in recent years, with a baseline ranking of about 167 for 2025. The liberal arts enrollment plan was 9 in 2023, reduced to 7 in 2024, and restored to 9 in 2025.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. Ranked 21st in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, firmly among the top comprehensive universities in the country. The 2026 reputation evaluation is notably negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. Douyin popularity ranks 36th (relatively hot), with moderate to high attention on short video platforms. Applied Economics A+, Business Administration A+, Theoretical Economics A, Political Science A, Chinese Language and Literature A, World History A, Chinese History A, Law A, etc., with outstanding strength in liberal arts disciplines.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law has a high social recommendation (relatively hot), Finance/Economics/Economy is divided and wait-and-see, Chinese Language/Literature is recommended, highly correlated with Nankai University's liberal arts enrollment majors (Economics, Law, Business Administration, Public Administration). In 2026, Xinjiang's total examinees are about 238,000, with an estimated liberal arts proportion of about 31.4%, resulting in about 74,732 liberal arts examinees, a significant increase from about 24,010 in 2025, intensifying competition. The first batch of liberal arts undergraduate programs in 2025 had a score of 451, up from 425 in 2024, reflecting an overall upward shift in scores. Nankai University is located in Tianjin, with a liberal arts enrollment scale of 7-9 in recent years in Xinjiang, making it a cross-provincial enrollment, with limited impact from regional preferences on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the baseline ranking of 167 in 2025, the significant increase in the number of liberal arts examinees in Xinjiang in 2026 (intensified competition), and the negative reputation incident (suppressing some popularity), the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to move slightly forward compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is about 162, with a range of 112-212.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult)
- Economics (Economics, International Economics and Trade, Finance, Business Economics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy)
- Business Administration (Future Business Leaders Program) (Business Administration, Human Resource Management, Financial Management, Accounting, Marketing, etc.)
- Public Administration (National Governance and Social Development Outstanding Talent Program) (Sociology, Social Work, Administrative Management, Urban Management, Political Science and Administration, International Politics)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: For rankings within the predicted range of 112-212, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Law as the main choice, with Tier 1 Economics as a reach, and Tier 3 Business Administration and Public Administration as safety options. If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 120), prioritize aiming for Economics; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (e.g., above 200), focus mainly on Tier 3.
